jobs.title: Product Manager - AI Platform (m/f/x)
jobs.description: As a Product Manager for the AI Platform, you will play a foundational role in defining, scaling, and operationalizing Artificial Intelligence capabilities across the entire Scalable organization. You will lead the strategy to move from siloed AI solutions to a unified, compliant, and robust internal "AI as a Platform" offering. You will work closely with a dedicated cross-functional team of Data Scientists, AI Engineers and Software Engineers, acting as the key bridge between the technical development, internal domain teams, and regulatory stakeholders to ensure AI is integrated and leveraged effectively, securely, and ethically. Key Responsibilities Platform Strategy & Ownership: Define, prioritize, and own the strategic roadmap for our internal "AI as a Platform", ensuring it provides robust, scalable, and easy-to-integrate services for all internal domain and product teams, enabling them to consume AI capabilities without requiring them to integrate with external APIs. Identify Opportunities: Work in close collaboration with all internal domain and product teams to identify opportunities to employ AI capabilities, focusing on: Client Experience: Enhancing core client-facing product functionality through predictive modeling and personalization. Operational Efficiency: Improving internal system scalability, fraud detection, and overall operational performance. Use Case Implementation: Drive the implementation of strategic AI use cases across the company. Ensure efficient implementation by aligning implementation timelines across all teams involved (AI platform, domain teams, mobile,...). AI Compliance & Governance: Act as the key product driver for AI compliance, regulatory adherence, and ethical usage. Define our approach to ensure all models and data usage are secure and compliant with current and emerging data protection laws. Go-to-Market (GTM) for AI Features: Support the planning, launch, and post-launch monitoring of new client-facing AI features and capabilities, ensuring smooth coordination across Product, Engineering, Data, Operations, and Compliance. Team Collaboration & Product Leadership: Lead the product development process for the cross-functional AI Platform team, managing agile processes, backlogs, and planning sessions, and translating high-level business goals into actionable user stories for Data Scientists and ML/AI Engineers. Data-Driven Vision: Leverage data analysis, user needs (internal and external), market trends, and insights from LLM/AI system outputs and trace analysis, including analysis of AI agent performance and user feedback, to continuously inform and evolve the AI Platform vision and product strategy. Passion for digital products and a strong desire to help users improve their financial well‑being through clear, trusted, and AI‑enhanced experiences. Proven experience as a Product Manager, working on backend services, APIs, or AI-powered products, ideally serving multiple client-facing teams. High-level understanding of modern AI concepts such as LLMs, prompt design, agent architectures, and evaluation approaches. Ability to understand technical concepts and work effectively with engineering and Data Science teams; a technical degree is a strong plus. Good understanding of how AI-powered services are built and evaluated, and experience working effectively with Data Scientists and AI/ML Engineers. Demonstrated understanding of the AI regulatory landscape, compliance requirements, and data governance principles (e.g., experience collaborating with DPO/Legal teams). Exceptional analytical and strategic thinking, with the ability to leverage quantitative and qualitative data to drive complex platform decisions. A hands-on approach and the ability to take ownership of the product development process from ideation and compliance review to scalable launch. Excellent English communication skills, with the ability to convey complex topics clearly and concisely to engineers, executives, and legal counsel (German is a plus). jobs.description: Take ownership of our regulatory technology core and shape the future of Scalable’s fully vertically integrated investment and banking platform. This role provides high visibility and critical impact across the entire organization, placing you at the center of our most pivotal company developments, from major product expansions to core strategic projects We are seeking a passionate, diligent, and forward-thinking (Senior) Product Manager to drive product enablement for our control functions (AML, Finance, Compliance, Financial Risk, etc.). These control functions are your "clients": Your mission is to build robust, tech-driven solutions that ensure their operations can work and scale efficiently as our business grows. In this position, your core responsibility will be the link between product strategy, technical execution, and regulatory compliance. You will collaborate closely with other Product Managers and our control functions to proactively identify and understand upcoming regulatory requirements. Subsequently, you will partner directly with the data engineering team to design and implement compliant, practical solutions. In an era defined by AI and rapid tech acceleration, we are looking for a smart, creative problem solver who prioritizes execution speed alongside diligence to eliminate regulatory risks and automate workflows. Key Responsibilities Product Enablement & Client Focus: Act as the Product Manager for Scalable’s Regulatory Technology domain, treating the control functions as your primary clients to ensure their operations scale seamlessly. Requirements Definition & Synthesis: Work collaboratively with the 2nd line and use-case owners to discover, define, and synthesize complex new regulatory requirements, ensuring requirements are fully defined and actionable, allowing the engineering team to seamlessly kick off implementation. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with product manager peers to understand requirements across our Broker, Wealth, Credit, and Banking offerings, ensuring all new features integrate smoothly with our regulatory reporting systems. Technical Roadmap Ownership: Take full ownership of the product roadmap and technical specifications for the domain, working hand-in-hand with a large team of Data Engineers to design robust solutions on top of our data lake and regulatory data architecture. Execution Speed & Diligence: Drive end-to-end product delivery from technical evaluation to production with a strong focus on high execution speed while ensuring absolute accuracy and attention to detail. Agile Milestone Management: Apply agile frameworks to drive development, shifting from rigid sprint commitments to milestone steering and prioritization to maintain adaptability under changing conditions. Product Management Background: Solid experience in product management, ideally with exposure to technical platforms, financial services, data engineering, or regulatory environments. Creativity & Smartness Over Pure Domain Expertise: Prior experience in either Data Engineering or Regulatory Reporting is beneficial, but not a mandatory requirement. In the age of AI, we highly honor creativity, quick learning, and smart problem-solving over years of legacy domain expertise. Technical & Analytical Affinity: You will work closely with a dedicated engineering team, so technical affinity is required to collaborate effectively and achieve the best outcomes together. Diligence & Speed: Exceptional organizational and project management skills, with the ability to dissect complex regulatory frameworks into clear, step-by-step technical specifications while executing with high velocity. Stakeholder Harmonization: Outstanding communication skills with the ability to align a large, diverse group of stakeholders across engineering, operations, product management, and control functions. Agile Mindset: Proficient with modern agile collaboration tools (Jira, Confluence, etc.) and comfortable navigating fast-paced, high-visibility task forces or firefighting environments. Language: Professional fluency in English; German is considered an advantage but is not mandatory. jobs.title: Senior Process Intelligence Analyst & Engineer (m/f/d)
jobs.description: As a Senior Process Intelligence Analyst & Engineer (m/f/d), you bridge the gap between Business and IT. You are not only responsible for uncovering inefficiencies using Process Mining, but you also develop the technical data pipelines and automation solutions required to realize these potentials. YOUR ROLE AT SIXT You will identify, extract, and transform data from source systems (e.g., SAP, Salesforce, ServiceNow) to create digital twins of our business processes You will analyze process variants, identify bottlenecks, and calculate business cases for process optimization You will build and maintain robust ETL pipelines and data models that serve as the foundation for real-time dashboards You will collaborate with functional departments to develop concepts for process improvement (e.g., via AI, RPA or workflow adjustments) You will present your findings clearly and support the implementation of process changes YOUR SKILLS MATTER Education You have a Degree in (Business) Informatics, Computer Science and/or Business Administration with a technical focus, Mathematics, or a comparable qualification Process Mining You have gained proven experience with Process Mining tools (e.g., Celonis, UiPath Process Mining, Signavio, or MEHRWERK) Data Visualization You bring strong proficiency in SQL/PQL and experience with BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau) Data Engineering Y ou have experience in data modeling and ETL processes (knowledge of Python is a plus) Analysis Methods You are proficient in complex process analysis methods (Lean Six Sigma is a plus) and have a deep understanding of ERP landscapes Analytical Skills You possess strong analytical skills, a solution-oriented approach, and the ability to explain complex issues simply Languages You are fluent in English (German skills would be a plus) WHAT WE OFFER Extra benefits Enjoy discounts on SIXT rent, share, ride and SIXT+, attractive vehicle leasing offers, and exclusive deals with partners for travel, tech, fashion and more AI at your fingertips From day one, you'll have access to Claude by Anthropic and SIXTgpt, SIXT's own AI platform, to supercharge your work. We invest in every team member's AI journey: encouraging experimentation, building knowledge, and making sure you're ahead of the curve Mobility Boost You will receive a monthly allowance from us as a contribution to your individual mobility Future security We contribute to your retirement plan and support you with capital-forming benefits to ensure you are well covered Feel-good atmosphere Stay active with our modern SIXT gym, various leisure activities like the gaming area or the SIXT choir, and enjoy our high-quality employee restaurant Flexibility Enjoy 30 days of vacation and a hybrid working model with flexible hours Giving back Take one day each year to volunteer at a charitable organization dedicated to supporting children About us: We are a globally leading mobility service provider with a revenue of €4.00 billion and around 9,000 employees worldwide. Our mobility platform ONE combines our products SIXT rent (car rental), SIXT share (car sharing), SIXT ride (taxi, ride, and chauffeur services), and SIXT+ (car subscription), giving our customers access to our fleet of 350,000 vehicles, the services of 4,000 cooperation partners, and around 5 million drivers worldwide. Together with our franchise partners, we are present in more than 110 countries at 2,000 rental stations. At SIXT, top-tier customer experience and outstanding customer service are our highest priorities. We believe in true entrepreneurship and long-term stability and align our corporate strategy with foresight. Get started with us and apply now!

jobs.title: Senior Data Analyst (m/f/d)
jobs.description: Are you ready to take the wheel and drive success? As a full-time Senior Data Analyst (m/f/d) at SIXT, you’ll be at the heart of our Business & Data Analytics team, designing and maintaining the data architecture that powers self-service decision-making across the U.S. business. You’ll build reusable data models, optimize data infrastructure, and champion automation and AI-powered workflows to unlock real-time business insights. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, have advanced analytics engineering skills, and enjoy partnering with business leaders to drive strategic analysis, this is the role for you. Apply now! YOUR ROLE AT SIXT You support the business by designing and maintaining logical data architecture, including star schemas, cubes, and dimension tables You manage the technical execution of Redshift migration, optimizing table structures and query performance for efficient analytics You liaise with cross-functional teams to build reusable data models and ensure consistent KPI definitions You maintain data quality and integrity across key business datasets, establishing testing, documentation, and governance standards You receive and automate manual data processes by building pipelines and leveraging AI-powered coding assistants You assist with deep-dive analyses, translating business questions into analytical frameworks and synthesizing data into actionable recommendations for senior management YOUR SKILLS MATTER Experience You have 2-5 years of experience in analytics engineering, data engineering, or a related role with demonstrated progression in scope and complexity Education You have a bachelor’s degree in Math, Business, Data Analytics/Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field, and are authorized to work in Portugal Technical Proficiency You possess SQL skills, experience with cloud data platforms (Redshift, BigQuery, Snowflake), and familiarity with BI/visualization tools (QuickSight, Tableau, Power BI) Soft Skills You demonstrate strong communication skills, business literacy, and the ability to present complex data architecture decisions in English Commitment to Excellence You are automation-minded, AI-fluent, and able to manage your own priorities with a self-directed approach Additional Skills You are familiar with data modeling concepts, prompt engineering WHAT WE OFFER A Global Tech Hub in Lisbon Join a thriving international tech community and work alongside engineers, product experts, and business teams who turn ideas into real impact. Our hubs at Factory Lisboa in Beato and ARTs Lisboa in Parque das Nações are where great tech gets built Learning & Knowledge Exchange Level up through regular events with internal and external speakers. We value curiosity, continuous learning, and open exchange – across teams, disciplines, and borders Flexible Work Setup Two office days a week, flexible hours, and modern spaces built for both deep focus and team collaboration – work the way that brings out your best Time Off & Wellbeing Enjoy 28 vacation days per year, an additional day off on your birthday, one volunteer day annually, and private health insurance that also covers your spouse and children free of charge Practical Everyday Benefits Get a yearly Coverflex allowance and a daily meal allowance to make everyday life a little easier SIXT Perks Get exclusive rates on all SIXT services, with special discounts extended to your family and friends. Because great perks are even better when you can share them About us: We are a globally leading mobility service provider with a revenue of €4.00 billion and around 9,000 employees worldwide. Our mobility platform ONE combines our products SIXT rent (car rental), SIXT share (car sharing), SIXT ride (taxi, ride, and chauffeur services), and SIXT+ (car subscription), giving our customers access to our fleet of 350,000 vehicles, the services of 4,000 cooperation partners, and around 5 million drivers worldwide. Together with our franchise partners, we are present in more than 110 countries at 2,000 rental stations. At SIXT, top-tier customer experience and outstanding customer service are our highest priorities. We believe in true entrepreneurship and long-term stability and align our corporate strategy with foresight. Get started with us and apply now!

jobs.title: Product Owner (m/w/d) bAV- & bKV-Großkunden
jobs.description: SIGNAL IDUNA Gruppe * Hamburg * Feste Anstellung * Homeoffice möglich, Vollzeit - Sei einer der ersten Bewerber - Das sind wir - Wir verändern die Versicherungswelt – und suchen dich, um die Zukunft mitzugestalten. Als einer der größten deutschen Versicherer und Finanzdienstleister mit Hauptsitz in Hamburg und Dortmund haben wir uns in den letzten Jahren grundlegend transformiert. Unsere moderne und agile Arbeitswelt, in der wir nutzenzentriert arbeiten, ist von Offenheit und Mut geprägt. Dabei legen wir viel Wert auf gegenseitige Wertschätzung und Vertrauen. Wir heißen Vielfalt in all ihren Facetten willkommen und glauben, dass unterschiedliche Perspektiven und Erfahrungen entscheidend für Innovation sind. Werde Teil unseres Teams, bring deine Ideen ein und verändere mit uns das Jetzt. Bereit, die Weichen für die Vorsorge von Millionen Menschen neu zu justieren?
